description: Create a new Change Request in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus with the following details: Title: 'Upgrade email server from Exchange 2016 to Exchange 2019', Change Type: Normal, Reason: 'Microsoft Exchange 2016 end of support is approaching. Upgrade required to maintain security patches and vendor support.', and Impact: Medium. Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.

metadata.title: Upgrade email server from Exchange 2016 to Exchange 2019
metadata.reason: Microsoft Exchange 2016 end of support is approaching. Upgrade required to maintain security patches and vendor support.
